name: FUNDAMENT ÷ Murk = ...........X..
description:
The thing: Fundament and Murk join forces for a night of Drum & Bass, Jungle and other forms of radical bass music.
These 2 crews/concepts/aesthetics/whatever you wanna call them, are an obvious match.
Shared principles: Old school. New school. Lineage. Future. Bass. Vynl. Digital. Pressure. Experiment.
Genres: Half time, Techstep, Footwork, Darkstep, Minimal. Atmospheric, 90s jump up. UK Bass & more.
The venue: The warm, free flowing vibes of oslo's soundest cultural institution - MiR.

The DJs:

Xcstnz
Ross B
Haidama

More TBA!

CC: 62 nok
